rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN LAWERENCE WEST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/29/2021 1) Assignments filed after the petition for final distribution was filed it appears the petition needs to be amended to change the distribution and to address LRSF 14.36 B. If distribution is to be made to an assignee of an heir or devisee, the assignee must file the original assignment, and the terms thereof must be disclosed in the petition for distribution. Probate Code 11604. [LRSF 14.36 B.] 2) The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. Photocopies are not acceptable. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. [LRSF 14.35 D.] 3) If a beneficiary satisfies the requirement of Probate Code 11801, a certified copy of Letters certified within sixty (60) days and issued to the personal representative of the estate of the beneficiary, the original 13100 affidavit executed by the person(s) entitled to the beneficiary's share, or a certified copy of the Spousal/Domestic Partner Property Order issued to the beneficiary's surviving spouse/registered domestic partner must be filed before the hearing date. [LRSF 14.36 G.] 4) Please explain and file receipts in support of entry 10/12/2020 Reimbursement for Pre-Sale House Expenses of $10,703.89. 5) The caption of the proposed order must begin with Order for Final Distribution. [LRSF 14.36 I. 6)] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/15/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/29/2021 1) Please give notice of the petition to the trust beneficiaries. [Probate Code 1208, 1202]. 2) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/15/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PAUL WESTERBERG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/29/2021 1) Counsel still needs to file timesheets for the ordinary statutory attorney services provided to the personal representative so that the Court may determine whether the requested extraordinary fees are "just and reasonable" (Prob. C. 10811(a)). 2) See LRSF 14.36 I. 6) b. The caption of the order must begin with Order for Final Distribution. Do not put Examiner's name on the proposed order. 3) See LRSF 14.35 D: The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. Photocopies are not acceptable. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. 4) Court to determine at the eventual hearing whether petitioner breached their fiduciary duty by keeping over $250,000.00 in a single account over the FDIC insurance limit. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/15/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MCNEAL VERNON WILLIAMS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/29/2021 to allow time to process objections in the filing queue and for examiner to receiver the required courtesy copy from objector. 1) Please explain if there has been any update to the claims by SFMTA. 2) Please explain why it is appropriate for the estate to pay SFMTA citations on vehicles then give the vehicles away at a loss to the estate. 3) Attorney please file timesheets for both ordinary and extraordinary services provided to the personal representative so that the Court may determine whether the requested extraordinary fees are "just and reasonable" (Prob. C. 10811(a)). 4) Administrator please file timesheets for both ordinary and extraordinary services so that the Court may determine whether the requested extraordinary fees are "just and reasonable" (Prob. C. 10801). 5) Please explain why the petition alleges certain documents will be filed with the petition and then have not been filed. 6) Please explain why is appropriate for the estate to reimburse what appears to be $1,610.56 for storage costs for property that were worn and of little to no value, donated, and a $250.00 loss to the estate. Unclear why this was rented to allow Kelvin Jones Mackentral Williams to coordinate possession of the property when the petition claims Kelvin Jones is not an heir. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/15/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MUI TAI VONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Title To Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Probate Code section 856 provides in relevant part that: "If the court is satisfied that a conveyance should be made, the court shall make an order authorizing and directing the personal representative or other fiduciary, or the person having title to or possession of the property, to execute a conveyance to the person entitled thereto, or granting other appropriate relief." No personal representative of the decedent's estate has been appointed to execute a conveyance. The petition requests an order declaring that the decedent's 1/3 interest in the Rutland property "is now titled in the name of" the petitioners. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

Mr. Bucher's clients must file an amended duties and liabilities form that has their phone numbers, and Mr. Bucher's and Mr. Shalby's clients must all file the confidential attachment to the duties and liabilities form (this form cannot be efiled). filing deadline is noon on 11/1/21.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FRANK RENDE AND KATHERINE D. RENDE REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust With Consent Of All Beneficiaries Under Probate Code 15409 And 172
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: KING LY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION For Family Allowance, Community Property, Family, Dwelling/Probate Homestead, Promissory Es
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required for the court to determine whether to grant any or all relief requested without a personal representative appointed in the estate, and without there being estate property (other than an allegation that if the trustor put community property in the trust, it must be returned to the estate and thence to petitioner -SPP filed). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROSS C. GORDON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will. No appearance required. No conformed copy of signed order will be returned (no self-addressed stamped envelope provided). Petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration must be filed by 10/24/2022. If not on file, appearance required at status hearing set for 11/07/2022.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDWARD CLARENCE BANKS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/08/2021 (no earlier date available). Notes were e-mailed to petitioners in pro per on 10/12/2021. Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTINA CLUM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Matter will be called for admission of will. Appearance is not required.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MYRTLE DONALDSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to 11/8/21. no later than noon on 11/1/21, the following documents must be filed: amended duties and liabilities form that includes the petitioners phone numbers; confidential attachments to that form for each petitioner (please note, this form cannot be efiled); supplement signed and verified by petitioners identifying the trustee(s) of the devisee trust, and if the trustee(s) is petitioner(s), the beneficiaries of the trust must also be listed and identified as such. proof of publication is pending and not yet filed, so not yet reviewed. examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TIFFANY HUANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/15/2021. Examiner receieved unfiled documents which have been left at room 103 for counsel to pick by 11/25/2021 or they will be recycled. [LRSF 14.7 C.] Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/1/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CESAR ABREAU RIBEIRO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/22/2021 per counsel's request (via e-mail on 10/12/2021). Notes were e-mailed to counsel on 10/12/2021, even though no courtesy copy of the petition and proposed order had been received.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PRESTON DOUGLAS BROWN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to 11/8/21. there is no confidential attachment to the duties and liabilities form on file (please note, this form cannot be efiled). in addition, Stuart Brown has priority to serve over the nominee of a person in the same class, and he has neither declined to serve nor nominated petitioner to serve. filing deadline is noon on 11/1/21.
